title: UK-AIR Air Quality Archive
description: DEFRA UK-AIR air quality monitoring archive data. Contains hourly and daily measurements of pollutants (NO2, PM10, PM2.5, O3, SO2, CO) from London monitoring stations, downloaded as CSV files from the UK-AIR flat files service.

site_id.description: DEFRA monitoring site ID (e.g. BG1, BL0, BN1).

pollutant.description: Pollutant code (e.g. NO2, PM10, PM2.5, O3, SO2, CO).

file_url.description: Download URL for the CSV file.

file_path.description: Local path to the downloaded file.

manifest_url.description: URL of the site archive listing page.
